2604.11359.title: CoRe-ECG: Advancing Self-Supervised Representation Learning for 12-Lead ECG via Contrastive and Reconstructive Synergy
2604.11359.paper_summary: Accurate interpretation of electrocardiogram (ECG) remains challenging due to the scarcity of labeled data and the high cost of expert annotation. Self-supervised learning (SSL) offers a promising solution by enabling models to learn expressive representations from unlabeled signals. Existing ECG SSL methods typically rely on either contrastive learning or reconstructive learning. However, each approach in isolation provides limited supervisory signals and suffers from additional limitations, including non-physiological distortions introduced by naive augmentations and trivial correlations across multiple leads that models may exploit as shortcuts. In this work, we propose CoRe-ECG, a unified contrastive and reconstructive pretraining paradigm that establishes a synergistic interaction between global semantic modeling and local structural learning. CoRe-ECG aligns global representations during reconstruction, enabling instance-level discriminative signals to guide local waveform recovery. To further enhance pretraining, we introduce Frequency Dynamic Augmentation (FDA) to adaptively perturb ECG signals based on their frequency-domain importance, and Spatio-Temporal Dual Masking (STDM) to break linear dependencies across leads, increasing the difficulty of reconstructive tasks. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple downstream ECG datasets. Ablation studies further demonstrate the necessity and complementarity of each component. This approach provides a robust and physiologically meaningful representation learning framework for ECG analysis.
2604.11359.paper_summary_zh: 準確解讀心電圖（ECG）仍然具有挑戰性，因為標記數據稀缺且專家註釋成本高昂。自監督學習（SSL）提供了一個有前景的解決方案，使模型能夠從未標記信號中學習表達性表示。現有的ECG SSL方法通常依賴於對比學習或重建學習。然而，單獨使用每種方法所提供的監督信號有限，並且面臨其他限制，包括由簡單增強引入的非生理性失真和模型可能利用的多導聯之間的微不足道相關性作為捷徑。在這項工作中，我們提出了CoRe-ECG，一種統一的對比和重建預訓練範式，建立了全局語義建模和局部結構學習之間的協同互動。CoRe-ECG在重建過程中對齊全局表示，使實例級的區別信號能夠指導局部波形恢復。為了進一步增強預訓練，我們引入了頻率動態增強（FDA），根據ECG信號在頻域的重要性自適應地擾動信號，並引入時空雙重掩蔽（STDM）以打破導聯之間的線性依賴，增加重建任務的難度。我們的方法在多個下游ECG數據集上達到了最先進的性能。消融研究進一步證明了每個組件的必要性和互補性。這種方法為ECG分析提供了一個穩健且生理上有意義的表示學習框架。
2604.11359.author: Zehao Qin et.al.
2604.11359.authors: Zehao Qin, Xiaojian Lin, Ping Zhang, Hongliang Wu, Xinkang Wang, Guangling Liu, Bo Chen, Wenming Yang, Guijin Wang
